title: Tanya Tamarchenko
compiled_truth: Tanya Tamarchenko is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-28), Tanya Tamarchenko sent 74 and received 382 emails, totalling 456 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (66), [Wenyao Jia](people/wenyao-jia) (19), [Jaesoo Lew](people/jaesoo-lew) (16), [Naveen Andrews](people/naveen-andrews) (15), [Rabi De](people/rabi-de) (15). Mailbox folders observed: c, inbox, var.
